label: Social discount rates for EU Cohesion Policy CBA

standard.label: Standard social discount rate for EU member states
standard.applies_to: Western and Northern EU member states (non-convergence)

cohesion.label: Social discount rate for Cohesion/convergence regions
cohesion.applies_to: Central and Eastern EU member states, IPA countries, regions with GDP < 75% of EU average

financial_benchmark.label: Financial discount rate benchmark for 2021-2027 programming period

member_state_overrides: Member States may set country-specific rates. Check national CBA guidelines for deviations from the EU benchmark.

source.publication: Guide to Cost-Benefit Analysis of Investment Projects for Cohesion Policy 2014-2020; Economic Appraisal Vademecum 2021-2027
source.publisher: European Commission, DG Regional and Urban Policy
